title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・再始動

text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki has treated us all to an absolutely
sublime show.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Fuji Kiseki has taken first!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff!

Cheers and yells of joy split the air and envelop
Fuji Kiseki.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member A
text_block_list.text: Fujiii! Sniff! She was lovelier than ever today!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member B
text_block_list.text:
She waaas! She was more amazing than she said
she would beee!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you for watching my show, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I staked everything I had on this race, so I hope
you had a good time!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The climax of this story will take place at the
grand 2,500-meter track of the Arima Kinen,
where there will be tough opponents galore!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"I hope you're prepared, because the next race
will be my ultimate masterpiece!"

Fuji Kiseki's graceful bow is projected on the
venue's massive monitor.

She releases a white pigeon into the sky... and
disappears.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I finally understand!

When she comes back, Fuji Kiseki's expression is
lit up with excitement like I've never seen on her
before.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I finally found what it is that I've been wanting to
show everyone—and what it looks like to run with
it!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
At last, the Arima Kinen is before our eyes. At
2,500 meters, it's going to be a high hurdle to
clear...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Everyone will be expecting a lot from this climax
because of how difficult it will be.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
In other words, it means it'll be a major failure if I
lose.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I can already hear people saying things like,
"Guess not even Fuji Kiseki could do it."
choice_data_list: You'll be fine. I'm sure of it.
You'll be fine. I'm sure of it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks. That's right. I've already made up
my mind, after all...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'm running away now. I'll show
everyone I can reach my goal.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll shine before everyone as the best entertainer
ever!

It's not long until the Arima Kinen. The climax is
nigh, and so many dreams are riding on it!
